# Symprio — AI & Automation Solutions for the Modern Enterprise

> Symprio is a global AI & automation consultancy headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia with offices in Silicon Valley (USA), Singapore, and India. We serve 45+ enterprise clients across 15+ countries.

## Services

- [Robotic Process Automation (RPA)](https://isai-alai.live/services/rpa): End-to-end RPA using UiPath, Power Automate & Automation Anywhere. Assessment, bot development, CoE setup, managed support. 400+ bots deployed.
- [AI Application Development](https://isai-alai.live/services/ai-development): Custom chatbots, AI agents, RAG systems, LLM fine-tuning, computer vision, document intelligence.
- [Agentic AI & LLM Solutions](https://isai-alai.live/services/agentic-ai): Autonomous AI agents that reason, decide and act. LLM fine-tuning, RAG implementation for enterprises.
- [Process Assessment & Consultancy](https://isai-alai.live/services/process-assessment): We study your business processes and recommend the optimal automation strategy. Domain-agnostic.
- [Digital Transformation](https://isai-alai.live/services/digital-transformation): Strategy, roadmap, change management and execution from assessment to full-scale transformation.
- [ERP & Oracle Services](https://isai-alai.live/services/erp-oracle): Oracle Cloud & R12 ERP implementations, upgrades, migrations and integrations.
- [Custom Software Development](https://isai-alai.live/services/custom-software): Full-stack web apps, mobile apps, cloud-native solutions with agile methodology.
- [Digital Workforce & Staff Augmentation](https://isai-alai.live/services/digital-workforce): Expert RPA, AI and IT talent with flexible engagement models.

## Training

- [RPA Training](https://isai-alai.live/training/rpa): UiPath & Power Automate training, foundation to advanced.
- [AI & GenAI Training](https://isai-alai.live/training/ai-genai): ChatGPT, Claude, Manus, n8n, vibe coding, AI agent workflows.
- [Corporate Workshops](https://isai-alai.live/training/corporate-workshops): C-suite AI strategy, governance, digital transformation leadership.

## Company

- [About Us](https://isai-alai.live/about): Our mission, team, offices, and values.
- [Case Studies](https://isai-alai.live/case-studies): Real-world automation success stories across banking, insurance, healthcare, telecom, manufacturing.
- [Blog](https://isai-alai.live/blog): Insights on AI, RPA, Agentic AI, digital transformation and automation.
- [Careers](https://isai-alai.live/careers): Join our team across engineering, consulting, sales, marketing.
- [Contact](https://isai-alai.live/contact): Free consultation. Email: contact@symprio.com, Phone: +60 13 880 2574.

## Key Facts

- 45+ enterprise clients including Meta, Amway, Coca-Cola, Nextracker, Uniqlo
- 400+ RPA bots deployed across APAC
- 50+ active consultants
- 15+ countries served
- Partners: UiPath, Microsoft, Oracle, Salesforce, Google, Meta
- Support subscription: $50/hour, minimum 50 hours (Bronze/Silver/Gold tiers)
